summary: feat(settings): update promo banner styles to match Figma
description:
Because:
 - The Firefox promo and account-recovery banners did not match the
   updated Figma spec, and reviewers flagged the dismiss button
   overlapping the heading and sitting above the top line of text.
 - The passkey inline-TOTP functional test hung on the relying-party
   redirect, failing the functional job independently of the banner work.

This commit:
 - Aligns banner padding, image sizing, and CTA placement to the Figma
   spec, with the CTA below the description.
 - Reserves heading space and lowers the dismiss button so it aligns with
   the heading's top line and no longer overlaps the text.
 - Removes redundant location.search handling in both banners.
 - Stabilizes the passkey inline-TOTP setup test by opting the
   continue-to-RP click out of Playwright's navigation wait, which the
   relying-party bounce loop never lets settle.
